title: neostenanthera
intro: Neostenanthera is a genus of flowering plants in the family Annonaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to the presence of various compounds such as alkaloids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Neostenanthera include its potential use in treating various conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Neostenanthera is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can be found in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules.
